nasb.text: So all the men of Israel withdrew from following David and followed Sheba the son of Bichri; but the men of Judah remained steadfast to their king, from the Jordan even to Jerusalem.

esv.text: So all the men of Israel withdrew from David and followed Sheba the son of Bichri. But the men of Judah followed their king steadfastly from the Jordan to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 於是以色列眾人都上山去，不跟隨大衛，卻跟隨了比基利的兒子示巴；猶大人卻緊緊跟隨他們的王，從約旦河直到耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: 于是，以色列人都离开了大卫，跟随了比基利的儿子示巴。但犹大人仍然紧紧跟随他们的王，从约旦河一直来到耶路撒冷。
